text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint little village nestled between rolling hills and dense forests, there lived a curious squirrel named Cedric. Although small, Cedric had an insatiable curiosity about the world around him. Every day after gathering his precious acorns, he would explore the nearby woods.

One morning, as Cedric scampered through the ancient oak trees, he noticed a peculiar glow emanating from somewhere deep within the forest. Intrigued, he followed it. Eventually, he discovered a clearing where there was a sparkling pool humming with light. In the center of the pond floated an unusual orb, pulsating with various colors.

Ever since he could remember, the orb was said to grant whoever dared to touch it three wishes. But there was a catch: each wish had to bring good into the world somehow. And so begins Cedric's quest.

With cautious pride, Cedric touched the orb. A warm wind swept through his fur, and his eyes widened as colors danced around
